mapper.sql: p.POST_ID, p.TITLE AS POST_TITLE, p.LIKE_COUNT, p.VIEW_COUNT, p.IS_ANONYMOUS, u.NAME, v.VISIT_ITEM_ID, v.VISIT_ORDER, v.SCHEDULE_TYPE, pl.TITLE AS PLACE_TITLE, pl.ADDR1, pl.FIRST_IMAGE, pl.PLACE_TYPE
FROM schedule_post p JOIN visit_item v ON p.POST_ID = v.SCHEDULE_ID JOIN place pl ON v.PLACE_ID = pl.PLACE_ID JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.user_id
mapper.select:
SELECT
ORDER BY p.like_count DESC, p.post_id ASC, v.VISIT_ORDER ASC

SELECT
ORDER BY p.view_count DESC, p.post_id ASC, v.VISIT_ORDER ASC

SELECT
ORDER BY p.title DESC, p.post_id ASC, v.VISIT_ORDER ASC

SELECT
ORDER BY p.posted_at DESC, p.post_id ASC, v.VISIT_ORDER ASC

SELECT
WHERE p.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pl.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY p.like_count DESC, p.post_id ASC, v.VISIT_ORDER ASC

SELECT
WHERE p.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pl.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY p.view_count DESC, p.post_id ASC, v.VISIT_ORDER ASC

SELECT
WHERE p.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pl.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY p.title DESC, p.post_id ASC, v.VISIT_ORDER ASC

SELECT
WHERE p.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pl.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY p.posted_at DESC, p.post_id ASC, v.VISIT_ORDER ASC

SELECT
WHERE p.USER_ID = #{userId} AND (p.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pl.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY p.like_count DESC, p.post_id ASC, v.VISIT_ORDER ASC

SELECT
WHERE p.USER_ID = #{userId} AND (p.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pl.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY p.view_count DESC, p.post_id ASC, v.VISIT_ORDER ASC

SELECT
WHERE p.USER_ID = #{userId} AND (p.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pl.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY p.title ASC, p.post_id ASC, v.VISIT_ORDER ASC

SELECT
WHERE p.USER_ID = #{userId} AND (p.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pl.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY p.posted_at DESC, p.post_id ASC, v.VISIT_ORDER ASC
SELECT BUDGET_DETAILS FROM schedule_post WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
SELECT TODO_DETAILS FROM schedule_post WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}

SELECT v.VISIT_ITEM_ID, v.VISIT_ORDER, p.PLACE_ID, p.TITLE, v.DISTANCE_TO_NEXT, v.SCHEDULE_TYPE FROM schedule_post sp JOIN visit_item v ON sp.POST_ID = v.SCHEDULE_ID JOIN place p ON v.PLACE_ID = p.PLACE_ID WHERE sp.POST_ID = #{postId} ORDER BY v.VISIT_ORDER ASC

SELECT p.TITLE, v.VISIT_ORDER, p.MAPX, p.MAPY, v.DISTANCE_TO_NEXT FROM schedule_post sp JOIN visit_item v ON sp.POST_ID = v.SCHEDULE_ID JOIN place p ON v.PLACE_ID = p.PLACE_ID WHERE sp.POST_ID = #{postId} ORDER BY v.VISIT_ORDER ASC
SELECT TITLE FROM schedule_post WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
SELECT LIKE_COUNT FROM schedule_post WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
SELECT VIEW_COUNT FROM schedule_post WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
SELECT USER_ID FROM schedule_post WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
mapper.update: UPDATE schedule_post SET LIKE_COUNT = LIKE_COUNT + 1 WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
UPDATE schedule_post SET VIEW_COUNT = VIEW_COUNT + 1 WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT CONCAT('SCH', LPAD(NEXT VALUE FOR seq_my_schedule, 3, '0'))
INSERT INTO my_schedule (MY_SCHEDULE_ID, TITLE, START_AT, BUDGET_DETAILS, TODO_DETAILS, USER_ID, IS_SHARED) VALUES (#{generatedId}, #{title}, NOW(), #{budgetDetail}, #{todoDetail}, #{userId}, 0)

INSERT INTO visit_item (VISIT_ITEM_ID, VISIT_ORDER, DISTANCE_TO_NEXT, PLACE_ID, SCHEDULE_ID, SCHEDULE_TYPE) VALUES (NEXT VALUE FOR seq_visit_item, #{visitOrder}, #{distanceToNext}, #{placeId}, #{myScheduleId}, #{scheduleType})
